catalog_content:
Item Name: Thick Colombian Spanish Moss Live Strands with Wire Hook - Tillandsia Usneiodes - Live Tillandsia Succulent House Plants - Home and Garden Decor - Easy Care Indoor and Outdoor Plants
Bullet Point 1: AIR PLANT SIZE: Approximately 12-16 inches long and 3-5 inches wide
Bullet Point 2: MULTIPLE USES: Air plants add beauty to indoor and outdoor spaces. Place them in terrariums, wall planters, containers, globes and use them to stylize vertical gardens displays. Spanish moss should ideally be hung. As a succulent alternative, Tillandsia (air plants) can decorate events like weddings, birthdays and Christmas. Use them as party favors, centerpieces or as unique gifts.
Bullet Point 3: EASY-TO-CARE-FOR: Air Plants (Genus: Tillandsia) are hardy bromeliad plants from Central and South America that don't require soil to grow. Simply soak them in water for 20 to 30 minutes once a week and let them dry out. They require indirect, but bright light. A care instruction card from Air Plant Shop will be included in every order.
Bullet Point 4: HAND PACKAGED & PICKED: Our shippers are trained to only send the healthiest living plants. We pack every kit and plant assortment with quality and care. All our plants come with health guarantee. Let us know if you are not completely happy with your order and we will send you new plants.
Bullet Point 5: ABOUT BLOOMING & COLOR: Our Tillandsia Usneiodes Colombian Spanish Moss will not always arrive in bloom with red and purple color. However, most will bloom 2-3 times a year. See photos for what the non-blooming green plants look like.

catalog_content:
Item Name: Monin - Sugar Free French Vanilla Syrup, Bold Vanilla Bean Flavor, Great for Coffee, Cocktails, & Lattes, Gluten-Free, Vegan, Non-GMO (1 Liter)
Bullet Point 1: GREAT FOR COFFEE & LATTES: There’s no substitute for the smooth, rich flavor of French vanilla. When you add Monin Sugar Free French Vanilla Syrup to your beverage, you’ll taste the premium vanilla beans from Madagascar, without the sugar or calories.
Bullet Point 2: TASTING NOTES: Distinctive and sweet, delivering a bold vanilla aroma with delicious vanilla flavor, derived from select Madagascar vanilla beans.
Bullet Point 3: SPECIFICATIONS: Allergen Free, Dairy Free, Gluten Free, Calorie Free, Halal, Kosher, No Artificial Colors, No Artificial Flavors, Non GMO, & Vegan
Bullet Point 4: SYRUP TO SUPPORT BEE COLONIES: Colony Collapse Disorder is greatly reducing bee populations worldwide. Our syrup recycling initiative has been sending waste syrup to feed bees since 2008, and has fed over 374 billion bees!
Bullet Point 5: GREEN PACKAGING & LABELING: With BPA free bottles, 100% recyclable boxes comprised of 30% recycled content, printed with biodegradable water-based ink containing zero pollutants, and pulp inserts, we’re doing our part for the environment.
Product Description: Derived from real Madagascar vanilla beans and designed especially for iced and fozen coffee drinks, our Sugar Free French Vanilla Syrup offers the perfect amount of smooth sweetness to make it a perennial favorite. So Much Smoothness! Monin Sugar Free French Vanilla Syrup is a versatile ingredient in specialty coffee beverages, skinny cocktails, kids’ drinks and more.
Value: 33.8
Unit: Fl Oz
overall_summary: Premium gourmet syrup positioned as a high-quality, sugar-free alternative for coffee and cocktails. Features real Madagascar vanilla beans and multiple certifications, indicating a mid-to-high price point. Eco-friendly packaging and ethical initiatives add value but may not significantly impact price perception.
